Header file template for defining Git version information macros.

# Purpose
This header file defines a set of preprocessor macros related to version control information. It includes macros for the Git timestamp, tag, major, minor, and patch version numbers, as well as formatted version strings. The macros are placeholders that are intended to be replaced with actual version information during the build process. This file is typically used to embed versioning details into a software application, allowing the application to access and display its version information at runtime.
